title: artemisia baumgartenii subsp. eriantha
intro: Artemisia baumgartenii subsp. eriantha is a subspecies of the Artemisia genus, commonly known as a type of wormwood plant. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Artemisia baumgartenii subsp. eriantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and essential oils, often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
